manifestDigestAlgorithm: sha256(canonical JSON array of path, encodedSha256, rgbaSha256)

scaleAndGeometry.componentCleanup: 512px source clear in audited transparent gap; protected subject/central-effect region exact; same historical 512->256 derivation
scaleAndGeometry.attack4: same-pet same-view authored counter-4 source; same historical 512->256 derivation; no mirror
scaleAndGeometry.knockaway: integer horizontal translation of entire 512px source; primary width/height/area and alpha mass exact; no rescale
scaleAndGeometry.downGroup: integer horizontal translation of current repaired 256px RGBA; width/height/alpha mass exact; no rescale

alphaMarginConvention.interpretation: 14px is the production visible-silhouette gate at A>=8; 13px includes pre-existing sub-threshold Lanczos fringe at A>0

knockawayRuntimeResampleQuantization.reason: integer 512px translation can change the half-scale Lanczos sampling phase; source alpha/geometry remains exact

downContinuitySummary.note: -18px is a group compromise across both horizontal boundaries; it minimizes aggregate and worst-case horizontal discontinuity, not each centroid independently

details.runtimeDerivation: historical straight-RGBA Lanczos 512->256 plus recorded fringe/alpha-floor cleanup
